hurston.description: Arid expanses with sandy dunes, sparse rocks, and dry air.
Murky, chemically contaminated shorelines near the industrial sectors.
Scrublands littered with strip-mining runoff and industrial scrap material.
Yellowed, dry grass plains interspersed with specialized organic trees.

microtech.description: Snow-capped rocky peaks subject to sudden, severe blizzards.
Dense clusters of evergreen trees surviving in sub-zero conditions.
Glacial plains and harsh permafrost landscapes found near the poles.
Mild, localized green valleys showcasing resilient planetary flora.
Massive expanses of solid sheet ice visible from high orbit.

arccorp.description: A completely terraformed artificial biome dominated by continuous skyscrapers, industrial factories, and glowing commercial plazas.

crusader.description: Layers of high-altitude clouds, violent wind currents, and breathable air pockets housing the floating city of Orison.

delamar.description: Cratered, low-gravity rocky surface with minimal geological variety, housing the Levski mining facility.

planets_and_moons.description: Cracked planetary surfaces featuring molten lava flows, searing heat, and violent geothermal vents.
Sun-baked, irradiated badlands stripped of atmosphere and moisture by high solar activity.
Freezing, dark rock faces covered in thick frost and methane-ice deposits on outer system bodies.
